adopters.name: EEP (Entity Engagement Protocol)
adopters.description: Protocol specification, JSON schemas, TypeScript and Python reference packages, tests, and documentation.
adopters.conformance: n/a (tooling and spec; not a live API product)

adopters.name: EEP reference stack (Docker)
adopters.description: Node + Python + Postgres + Redis example deployment for behavior and parity testing (informally eep-api).

adopters.name: @eep-dev/mcp-bridge
adopters.description: MCP tool runtime to EEP HTTP bridge (manifest, services, gates, tool call forwarding).

adopters.name: LangGraph EEP agent example
adopters.description: Example agent subscribing to EEP with gate handling and HMAC verification.

adopters.name: eep.dev site
adopters.description: Landing site, documentation mirror, and interactive playground (when published to eep.dev).
